bead.title: commit-by-default: .gitignore cleanup + docs update + repo dogfood
bead.description:
Bead 4 of 4 children under epic ddx-3562c48c. Depends on bead 2 (ddx-908a6d5d). May run in parallel with bead 3.

Make .ddx/plugins/, .agents/skills/, .claude/skills/ tracked-by-default; update all docs; dogfood by committing this repo's own.

GITIGNORE (.gitignore):
- DELETE line 434 (.ddx/plugins/).
- DELETE lines 449-453 (.claude/skills/*, .agents/skills/*, cli/.claude/skills/*, cli/.agents/skills/*).

DOCS:
- CLAUDE.md architecture section: plugins are project-local; ~/.ddx/plugins/, ~/.agents/skills/, ~/.claude/skills/, ddx install --global all retired.
- website/content/docs/plugins.md: update install model description.
- website/content/docs/cli/commands/ddx_skills.md (generated): update — re-run gendoc if needed.
- cli/cmd/skills.go:29 doc string: ~/.ddx/plugins/helix/skills → .ddx/plugins/helix/skills.
- README install section: update where it references global state.

REPO DOGFOOD (in this PR):
- After all other beads land, run ddx init && ddx install helix locally.
- git add .agents/skills/ .claude/skills/ .ddx/plugins/.
- Commit as part of this bead's PR.

FINAL GREP GATE:
rg -n '~/(\.ddx/plugins|\.agents/skills|\.claude/skills)' \
   --glob '!docs/helix/01-frame/features/FEAT-015*' \
   --glob '!CHANGELOG*' \
   --glob '!.git'
must return zero hits.

OUT OF SCOPE: state.json (~/.ddx/installed.yaml) relocation — separate follow-up bead.
bead.acceptance: 1. .gitignore line 434 (.ddx/plugins/) removed. 2. .gitignore lines 449-453 (.claude/skills/*, .agents/skills/*, cli/.claude/skills/*, cli/.agents/skills/*) removed. 3. CLAUDE.md, website/content/docs/plugins.md, website/content/docs/cli/commands/ddx_skills.md, README install section, cli/cmd/skills.go:29 all updated to project-local model. 4. Repo dogfoods: this repo's .agents/skills/, .claude/skills/, .ddx/plugins/ are committed in this bead's PR. 5. Final grep gate: rg -n '~/(\.ddx/plugins|\.agents/skills|\.claude/skills)' with the documented exclusions returns zero hits. 6. cd cli && go build ./... && go test ./... still passes.
